title: APM: Browser Fingerprinting via Canvas/WebGL/AudioContext
description: Detects browser fingerprinting techniques using Canvas API, WebGL parameters, and AudioContext observed in OpenTelemetry browser spans. Excessive fingerprinting API calls indicate tracking or reconnaissance.
query: 'Log Source' in ('enterprise-crm-portal', 'octo-drone-shop', 'SOC Application Logs') and ('HTTP URL' like '%canvas.toDataURL%' or 'HTTP URL' like '%webgl.getParameter%' or 'HTTP URL' like '%WEBGL_debug_renderer_info%' or 'HTTP URL' like '%AudioContext%' or 'HTTP URL' like '%OfflineAudioContext%' or 'HTTP URL' like '%navigator.plugins%' or 'HTTP URL' like '%navigator.hardwareConcurrency%') | stats count as FingerprintAttempts by 'Client IP', 'User Agent', 'service.name' | sort -FingerprintAttempts
